pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version is not updated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Pin Lombok version to 1.18.36 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.
